title: cassia rowleana
intro: Cassia rowleana is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the pea or legume family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, as it contains anthraquinone glycosides, which act as a laxative to stimulate bowel movements. Cassia rowleana is also known to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Cassia rowleana can be found in various forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
